notes: Vegetation cache hit: reused prior cover classification.
Fast vegetation mode: live NLCD sampling skipped for launch speed. Set MONAHINGA_USE_NLCD=1 to enable live vegetation samples.
Heuristic fallback: mid-scale terrain window biased toward shrub or mixed cover.

primary.title: Primary Sit — Core Converge
primary.reasoning: Win strength: Narrow. Breaks if: movement loads harder into the backup lane than this shelf. State Game Land 204 stays legal here; 695 m on a upper third bench. Primary read: Bench Bedding Edge. Support: terrain continuity. This sit is level with the surrounding pull with a flatter shelf on the side-hill, which creates a more believable hunting setup than a flat random point. It also holds better interior security than a boundary-hugging sit. Feature read: active=bench, cover; inactive=ridge, edge, open. General weighting keeps the base terrain read dominant. Vegetation read: shrub cover adds workable concealment and modestly strengthens travel and bedding confidence. This read came from terrain fallback rather than direct land-cover data, so confidence stays slightly tempered. Cover proxy: thicker-feeling travel structure adds security to movement here. Feeding proxy: bench-edge and lower-shelf terrain adds a mild destination pull. Competitive read: this is a narrow win over the nearest backup because it carries slightly cleaner total terrain fit. Conditional read: this stays viable unless movement loads harder into the backup lane than this shelf.
primary.feature_readout: Feature read: active=bench, cover; inactive=ridge, edge, open. General weighting keeps the base terrain read dominant.

corridors.name: Dominant Corridor
corridors.reasoning: Main travel line between the strongest legal sit positions along upper structure.

corridors.name: Secondary Corridor A
corridors.reasoning: Fallback connection between alternate sits when the primary lane is compromised.

notes: Selected bbox is enforced as a hard analysis fence before ranking and viewer payload generation.
Only legal areas can surface primary or alternate sits when verified legal candidates exist.
Restricted and unknown areas remain visible as suppressed near-misses.
Ranking now adds relative terrain trust logic so convergence, shoulder, funnel, bench, and edge reads come from the DEM instead of presentation-only phrasing.
Ranking blends terrain structure, legal gating, timing fit, and wind guard logic.
When no verified legal candidates exist inside the selected bbox, the system falls back to terrain-only review mode instead of crashing.
Provider health now reduces confidence and score when terrain or legal data is degraded.
Vegetation classification now meaningfully changes concealment, bedding confidence, and weak-cover penalties inside sit scoring.

summary.best_time_window: 2.5 hours before sunset through last light

species_profile.label: General Terrain Read
species_profile.positive_hook: General terrain read is active, so Monahinga™ is using the normal terrain-first scoring without species tuning.
species_profile.caution_hook: Select a target species only when you want the terrain read tuned to animal-specific behavior.

invalidators: Wind drifts into the preferred approach lane.
Access pressure rises on the legal edge.
The route forces you through the hot corridor instead of offsetting from it.
Terrain quality or legal verification is too weak to trust the sit call.

notes: Terrain layer fetched from the preferred real provider path.
Vegetation layer now uses multi-sample NLCD with terrain heuristic fallback.
Wildlife atmosphere layer generated BBOX-driven species and method context without touching the 3D terrain core.
Decision layer consumed DEM-derived terrain structure and legal gating.
Command surface rendered a terrain-first operator view with intelligence controls.
Provider status: terrain=cache, legal=cache, vegetation=degraded
Terrain cache hit: reused DEM instead of refetching elevation data.
Legal cache hit: reused PAD-US legal surface instead of querying ArcGIS.
Terrain derivative cache hit: reused rendered terrain layers and heightmap JSON.
Vegetation cache hit: reused cover classification.
Hunter core generated ranked zone intelligence before the decision artifact was built.
Vegetation cache hit: reused prior cover classification.
Fast vegetation mode: live NLCD sampling skipped for launch speed. Set MONAHINGA_USE_NLCD=1 to enable live vegetation samples.

wildlife_atmosphere.label: Appalachian hardwood wildlife atmosphere
wildlife_atmosphere.species_label: White-tailed Deer · Wild Turkey · Black Bear
wildlife_atmosphere.mood: dark hardwood ridges, laurel cover, cold creek bottoms
wildlife_atmosphere.story: Timber folds, side-hill cover, and disciplined access. Current cover signal suggests mixed brush, edge cover, and broken visibility.
wildlife_atmosphere.cover_read: mixed brush, edge cover, and broken visibility

species.name: White-tailed Deer
species.movement_read: Side-hill benches, bedding edges, and access discipline drive the setup.
species.visual_prompt: realistic mature whitetail buck in Appalachian hardwood ridge, cinematic hunting scouting background

species.name: Wild Turkey
species.movement_read: Open timber, roost-to-feed movement, and ridge transitions matter.
species.visual_prompt: realistic wild turkey in Appalachian hardwood forest, mature outdoor visual

species.name: Black Bear
species.movement_read: Thick cover, food sources, and shaded drainages shape the read.
species.visual_prompt: realistic black bear in Appalachian timber, serious hunter-focused scouting visual

wildlife_atmosphere.legal_note: Hunting method labels are general context only. Always verify state, season, tag, weapon, access, and safety rules before hunting.
wildlife_atmosphere.visual_style: mature cinematic hunter scouting atmosphere; realistic animals; no cartoon icons; dark textured background; subtle weapon-category context

hunt_intelligence.summary: Best Setup: Lower Bench Below Ridge. This is the lead option at 76/100 because Bench/flat security signal supports bedding or staging behavior nearby.. Best move: enter low, stay off the obvious travel edge, and hunt the downwind side. Breaks if: Wind direction should be verified before trusting the final setup..

top_zones.label: Lower Bench Below Ridge
reasoning: Bench/flat security signal supports bedding or staging behavior nearby.
Access score is acceptable because slope and relief are not punishing at this candidate point.
Relief/drainage shape suggests thermals matter here, especially morning and evening.
No usable wind direction supplied, so wind score stayed neutral.
Shrub or mixed cover gives useful concealment without making the area unreadable.
risks: Wind direction should be verified before trusting the final setup.
